title: Release gate validator
objective:
Create file governance/validators/validate_release_gates.py with content #!/usr/bin/env python3
import json
from pathlib import Path

REQUIRED = [
    Path("governance/proofs/external/telegram/production_receipt.json"),
    Path("governance/proofs/external/runtime/live_runtime_receipt.json"),
    Path("governance/proofs/external/claude/external_claude_audit_result.json"),
]

def main() -> int:
    missing = [str(p) for p in REQUIRED if not p.exists()]
    if missing:
        print(json.dumps({"status":"blocked_missing_release_receipts","missing":missing,"release_pass":False}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
        return 2
    invalid = []
    for p in REQUIRED:
        data = json.loads(p.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
        if not data.get("commit_sha") or data.get("status") not in {"real_pass", "real_fail"}:
            invalid.append(str(p))
    if invalid:
        print(json.dumps({"status":"blocked_invalid_release_receipts","invalid":invalid,"release_pass":False}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
        return 2
    print(json.dumps({"status":"release_gates_ready_for_external_decision","release_pass":False}, ensure_ascii=False))
    return 0

if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())
Create file tests/governance/test_release_gate_validator_fail_closed.py with content import subprocess
import sys

def test_release_gate_validator_fails_closed_without_real_receipts():
    result = subprocess.run([sys.executable, "governance/validators/validate_release_gates.py"], capture_output=True, text=True)
    assert result.returncode == 2
    assert "blocked_missing_release_receipts" in result.stdout
